suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: API routes accepting storage URLs (e.g., imageUrl, proofPhotoUrl) must validate the URL origin using isAllowedStorageUrl() from src/lib/url-allowlist.ts. This is defense-in-depth against SSRF and open redirect via user-supplied URLs pointing to untrusted origins.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-unconditional-xss-sanitization introduced isAllowedStorageUrl() utility and applied it in quest mission/complete routes, but the convention is not yet documented. Future gallery and other routes accepting URLs should follow the same pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The fullstack-worker skill's TDD procedure ('Write Tests First - Red Phase') should distinguish between new feature work and fix/refactor work. For fix features that modify existing code with existing test coverage, it's more efficient to modify code first and verify existing + new tests pass, rather than writing failing tests before the fix.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker on fix-unconditional-xss-sanitization noted this deviation in handoff skillFeedback: 'for this fix-focused feature modifying existing code, it was more efficient to modify the code first and verify existing + new tests pass.'

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md now documents the unconditional sanitization rule. This convention was added as part of prior scrutiny iterations.
